biological_replicate: the proteome quantification capability of this method was demonstrated by triplex labeling of a yeast proteome spiked with bovine serum albumin (BSA)
technical_replicate: the efficiency and reproducibility of the isobaric labeling steps and the quantification accuracy in complex samples were assessed by performing triplicate experiments on LysC peptides from a yeast proteome sample.
experimental_design: the proteome quantification capability of this method was demonstrated by triplex labeling of a yeast proteome spiked with bovine serum albumin (BSA)
factor_value: the quantification capability and dynamic range of the Ac-IPG approach in a complex background were assessed by preparing a BSA-yeast proteomics sample consisting of triplex-labeled LysC-digested BSA mixed at 1:5:10
number_of_fractions: triplex labeling of a yeast proteome spiked with bovine serum albumin (BSA)
number_of_biological_replicates: default value as no specific biological replicates are mentioned
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate (yeast) and 3 fractions from triplex labeling
